gt_sql: SELECT T1.baseSetSize FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T2.setCode = T1.code WHERE T2.translation = 'Hauptset Zehnte Edition'
pred_sql: SELECT s.baseSetSize FROM sets s JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode WHERE st.translation = 'Hauptset Zehnte Edition';
question: How many cards are there in the base set of "Hauptset Zehnte Edition"?
